title: PC Plus+
description: Everyone who plays Pixelmon agrees that sorting your PC can be a challenge. Well, I've got the solution! You can now easily filter your Pokémon with brand-new custom UI buttons to instantly find L100, HA, Shiny, all Gen 1-9 Legendaries  and more
body:
🚨 MY MAIN GOAL IS TO GET POKESMASH MC TO SEE THIS! SPREAD THE WORD! 🚨
(My IGN is Birdman311 — SmashMC Groudon server is the absolute best! Have suggestions or server requests? Email me at minecraftlvr311@gmail.com)

Everyone who plays Pixelmon knows that sorting your PC, whether in single-player or multiplayer, can be a massive headache. Finding that one specific Hidden Ability Pokémon, clearing out boxes of breedjects, or gathering all your Legendaries out of hundreds of boxes takes way too much time.

Well, I have got the solution!

🎉 Thank you for all the support, and enjoy the ultimate PC experience!

This mod completely upgrades your Pixelmon PC by adding a brand-new set of clickable custom UI buttons right onto your screen. Instead of manually typing out tedious search queries, you can now instantly filter, organize, and manage your boxes with a single click.

✨ NEW IN VERSION 1.0.6: THE GROUP UPDATE ✨
Ever wonder how many other players are running PC Plus+? Now you can spot them instantly!

See Fellow Users in the Tab List: A bright green + now appears right next to the name of every other PC Plus+ user on your server. Just open the player list (Tab) to see who else is part of the crew.

Spot Them In-World: Walk up to another player running the mod and the same green + floats right above their head.

Works on EVERY Server: Unlike the IV and Mass-Selection features, the Group + marker works on ANY multiplayer server you join — even ones that don't have the mod installed! No server-side setup needed.

This is the easiest way to find your community and show off that you're rocking the ultimate PC tool. Let's get those +'s spreading across PokeSmash! 🟢➕

✨ PREVIOUSLY ADDED IN VERSION 1.0.5: THE FAVORITES & IVS UPDATE ✨
The Favorite System: Never accidentally release your prized Pokémon again! Hover over any Pokémon in your PC and press Ctrl + R to favorite it. Favorited Pokémon receive a yellow star (★) and are strictly protected from the "Trash Selected" button! You can even filter them with the new @favorite button!

IV Filtering: Looking for your best competitive breeders? We have added a brand new IV drop-down menu! Instantly filter your PC to show only Pokémon with 70%+, 80%+, 90%+, or perfect 100% IVs. Combine this with the Types menu to find your perfect team in seconds!

Improved GUI & Alignment: The PC interface has been completely redesigned. The Types and new IV menus are perfectly scaled, neatly aligned with the top search bar, and safely moved away from the trash can for a smoother, distraction-free experience.

🔥 EXISTING FEATURES 🔥
Filter Chaining & Stackable Searches: Combine your searches like never before! You can now combine our custom tag buttons with the Types drop-down. Looking for a Shiny Water-type? Or a Dragon & Flying Legendary? Just click the tag you want (like @legendary), open the Types menu, and click up to two types. The search bar seamlessly builds your query automatically to find exactly what you need!

Dual-Type Filtering Dropdown: A clean "TYPES" menu lets you scroll through all 18 Pokémon types! Select up to two at a time (like Fire and Flying) to instantly highlight exact type combos in your boxes.

Custom UI Buttons: Adds convenient buttons directly to your PC screen for: @shiny, @legendary, @mythical, @ultrabeast, @HA, @textured, and L100!

Level 100 Filter: Instantly find all your max-level battle-ready Pokémon with the custom-built L100 button.

Accurate Hidden Ability Detection: The @HA button uses reliable detection to highlight exactly which Pokémon in your box have their Hidden Abilities—no more guessing!

Full Gen 1 - Gen 9 Support: The Legendary, Mythical, and Ultra Beast filters have been massively expanded. They don't just cover the classics; they fully recognize Paldean additions (like Koraidon, Miraidon, Ogerpon, and Pecharunt) and all the Paradox Pokémon!

CTRL-Click Multi-Move: Quickly select and move multiple Pokémon at once to make organizing a breeze! (See multiplayer note below).

Mass Delete (Trash Button): Select multiple junk Pokémon at once and instantly delete them all to clear out breedjects in seconds.

Valuables Protection: A built-in safety scanner stops you from accidentally deleting Favorites, Legendaries, Mythicals, Ultra Beasts, HAs, 100 IVs, or Textured Pokémon.

Custom Keybinds: Fully customize the Multi-Select key in the Minecraft Controls menu.

One-Click Clear: Done searching? Just hit the "Clear All" button to instantly reset your view and get back to managing your boxes.

🌐 MULTIPLAYER & SERVER INFO 🌐
All of the custom search and filter buttons (including the Type Menu, Favorites, and Stackable Filters) work perfectly out of the box on both Singleplayer and Multiplayer!

✅ Note for the Group + Marker: The green + that shows other PC Plus+ users works on ANY server you join — no server-side install required!

⚠️ Note for IV Filtering: Because of how Pixelmon handles data, the specific IV search filters rely on server-side logic. Therefore, the IV filters ONLY work in Singleplayer, or on a Multiplayer server that also has this mod installed!

⚠️ Note for Mass Selection: Please note that the Ctrl-click multi-move and mass-delete features are currently supported for Singleplayer only in this public build.

Why Servers Need This Mod: This is exactly why PokeSmash and other Pixelmon servers need this mod installed! Without it running on the server-side, players cannot experience the best tools like the new IV Filtering, Mass Deleting, and Ctrl-Click box organization. If you want these full features on your favorite server, let the owners know!

Server Owners: If you run a Pixelmon server (like SmashMC!) and want the full Ctrl-click organization, mass-delete functionality, and IV filters enabled for your players, contact me at minecraftlvr311@gmail.com. I would be more than happy to provide a dedicated server-compatible version just for your community!

⚙️ HOW TO USE ⚙️
Simply install the mod, jump into your world, and open any Pixelmon PC. When you open the search tab (default key is "I"), your new filter buttons and dropdowns will automatically appear on the screen.


To favorite a Pokémon: Hover over it and press Ctrl + R.
To multi-select: Hold Ctrl and Left-Click.


📺 MOD SHOWCASE & TUTORIAL 📺
A massive shoutout and thank you to DoomGardenShovel for making an awesome tutorial and showcase video for this mod! You can watch it to see all the features in action right here: 👉 https://youtu.be/jMXpQnbTO4g?si=dx6q0Ep9wVCZeMGG

📥 DOWNLOADS 📥
Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pc-plus
Patreon: https://patreon.com/Birdman311

💻 SOURCE CODE / GITHUB 💻
Want to see how it works under the hood or contribute? Check out the open-source code on GitHub here: https://github.com/birdman311/PC-Plus-/tree/main

📋 REQUIREMENTS 📋
Minecraft 1.16.5
Forge 36.2.34+
Pixelmon 9.1.13+
